sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 8

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 8:1
items.html:
(to the question) Be'er [well]
The Yesod of the Nukva [female] is called a well. This indicates the discernment of the Masach [screen] that is corrected there, which, through a Zivug [coupling], raises Ohr Chozer [Returning Light] from below upward — like a well that raises water from below upward. See Item 52. (p. 790, Item 87)
